prompt: The transaction does not roll back on error. What is the bug?
choices: Two UPDATE statements cannot run in the same transaction
If the second update throws, commit() is never reached but the first update is in an uncommitted transaction that is not rolled back
setAutoCommit(false) prevents all updates from executing
amount must be cast to String before interpolation
explanation: If the second UPDATE throws, the exception propagates out of the method with the transaction still open (uncommitted/not rolled back). The database may eventually auto-rollback but this is not guaranteed. Fix: add try-catch with conn.rollback() in the catch block, and always use try-with-resources.
